migrations.description: Drop and recreate chk_sq_source_hub CHECK constraint on lcs.signal_queue to add OUTREACH and SYSTEM to allowed source_hub values.
Revert chk_sq_source_hub to original 4 values (PEOPLE, DOL, BLOG, MANUAL).

rollback_plan.verification: SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid = 'lcs.signal_queue'::regclass AND conname = 'chk_sq_source_hub'; — should show only PEOPLE, DOL, BLOG, MANUAL.

validation_steps.step: SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid = 'lcs.signal_queue'::regclass AND conname = 'chk_sq_source_hub';
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid = 'lcs.signal_queue'::regclass AND conname = 'chk_sq_source_hub';
validation_steps.expected: Contains all 6 values: PEOPLE, DOL, BLOG, MANUAL, OUTREACH, SYSTEM.

validation_steps.step: INSERT INTO lcs.signal_queue (id, signal_set_hash, signal_category, sovereign_company_id, lifecycle_phase, preferred_channel, preferred_lane, agent_number, signal_data, source_hub, status, priority) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'SIG-VALIDATE-007', 'TEST', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'OUTREACH', 'MG', 'MAIN', 'TEST', '{}'::jsonb, 'OUTREACH', 'PENDING', 1);

INSERT INTO lcs.signal_queue (id, signal_set_hash, signal_category, sovereign_company_id, lifecycle_phase, preferred_channel, preferred_lane, agent_number, signal_data, source_hub, status, priority) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'SIG-VALIDATE-007', 'TEST', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'OUTREACH', 'MG', 'MAIN', 'TEST', '{}'::jsonb, 'SYSTEM', 'PENDING', 1);

pre_generation_checks.registry_first: PASS — lcs.signal_queue already registered in ctb.table_registry
